title: OpenAI chief tells G7 to 'not cede responsibilities' to AI giants
description: OpenAI chief executive Sam Altman urged world leaders at the G7 summit on Wednesday not to surrender control over artificial intelligence to the companies building it
content: OpenAI chief executive Sam Altman urged world leaders at the G7 summit on Wednesday not to surrender control over artificial intelligence to the companies building it, calling on governments to set global standards for deploying the rapidly advancing... [2076 chars]

title: "AI must empower people": PM Modi at G7 Summit
description: Prime Minister highlighted that while Artificial Intelligence was a transformative force with the potential to redefine the direction of human civilization, it must also empower people. He elaborated that it was with this larger thought that India had hosted the AI Impact Summit recently. Underlining India's human-centric or MANAV [human] vision for AI, he stated that the technology must be anchored in the principles of inclusivity, security, and public good.

title: Malaysian born actor Christopher Lee stars in Singapore’s first AI-hybrid drama, 'Crooks'

title: AI will lead to labour shortages, Amazon’s Jeff Bezos says in optimistic talk
description: Artificial Intelligence will lead to labour ⁠shortages, not the replacement of humans, Amazon founder Jeff Bezos predicted
content:
Artificial Intelligence will lead to labour ⁠shortages, not the replacement of humans, Amazon founder Jeff Bezos predicted in a highly optimistic appearance at the VivaTech technology conference in Paris on Wednesday.

title: AI must empower people: PM Modi at G7 Summit
description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi spoke at the G7 Summit in France about Artificial Intelligence. He stressed AI must empower people and be inclusive. Modi also met US President Donald Trump. They reviewed progress in defense, technology, and trade. Both leaders aim for a strong India-US partnership.

title: Apple CEO Tim Cook says AI boom makes price increases 'unavoidable'
description: Outgoing Apple CEO Tim Cook warned that demand for memory chips from the artificial intelligence boom will force the tech giant to increase the prices of its products, according to an interview with the Wall Street Journal published Wednesday.
